challenges.title: Sunset Gradient Button
challenges.description: Create a button with a linear gradient background that changes on hover.
challenges.instructions: Build a button using a warm sunset gradient. On hover, reverse or shift the gradient.
hints: Use linear-gradient with warm colors (orange, pink, purple)
On hover, change direction or colors
challenges.solution: .btn { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb, #f5576c); border: none; color: white; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; } .btn:hover { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f5576c, #f093fb); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(245,87,108,0.4); }

challenges.title: Pie Chart with Conic Gradient
challenges.description: Create a pie chart showing 4 data segments using only a conic gradient.
challenges.instructions: Use conic-gradient with hard stops to create a pie chart showing: 40% Sales, 25% Marketing, 20% R&D, 15% Admin.
hints: Use hard stops at cumulative percentages
Add labels or a legend near the pie
Use border-radius: 50% to make a circle

challenges.title: Animated Gradient Background with Patterns
challenges.description: Create a full-page animated gradient background that combines linear gradient animation with repeating pattern overlays.
challenges.instructions: Build a page background with: animated gradient base, semi-transparent repeating pattern overlay, and a glass-morphism card in the center.
hints: Use multiple backgrounds: animated gradient + repeating pattern
Use backdrop-filter for glass effect on card
challenges.solution: body { background: linear-gradient(-45deg, #ee7752, #e73c7e, #23a6d5, #23d5ab), repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, transparent, transparent 40px, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 40px, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 41px); background-size: 400% 400%, auto; animation: grad 15s ease infinite; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { body { animation: none; } } @keyframes grad { 0% { background-position: 0% 50%, 0 0; } 50% { background-position: 100% 50%, 50px 0; } 100% { background-position: 0% 50%, 0 0; } } .card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-radius: 16px; padding: 2rem; }
